note: Model B token cutover complete. The protocol token is now the public GLS launched on Pons (pons.family, symbol GLS, 18 decimals). StakingManager and ComputationCoordinator were redeployed to reference GLS; every other contract (NodeRegistry, ClusterManager, MXEFactory, ComputationRegistry, FeeOracle) plus the live cluster/MXE/circuit is the original deployment, reused unchanged. Node operators are not yet staked in GLS (fixed-supply token, no mint) — a fundable follow-up; the network serves jobs in the interim since fees are free.

superseded.note: Original live-staging deployment, replaced by the GLS cutover on 2026-07-12.
